2604.25346.title: A Faceted Proposal for Transparent Attribution of AI-Assisted Text Production
2604.25346.paper_summary: Artificial intelligence systems are increasingly integrated into writing processes, challenging traditional notions of authorship, responsibility, and intellectual contribution. Current disclosure practices usually indicate whether AI was used, but rarely explain how it was used, where it intervened, or how its output was reviewed. This paper proposes a faceted model for representing AI-assisted text production at the levels of documents, chapters, sections, and paragraphs. The proposal introduces a core model based on Form, Generation, and Evaluation, and an extended model that adds Intent, Control, and Traceability. The model is positioned as a minimal operational baseline with extensibility toward higher-fidelity representations. A worked example based on the production of this article demonstrates applicability.
2604.25346.paper_summary_zh: 人工智慧系統越來越多地融入寫作過程，挑戰傳統的作者身份、責任和智力貢獻的觀念。當前的披露實踐通常會指明是否使用了人工智慧，但很少解釋它是如何被使用的、在哪裡介入的，或其產出是如何被審查的。本文提出了一個多面向的模型，用於在文件、章節、部分和段落層面上表示人工智慧輔助的文本產出。該提案引入了一個基於形式、生成和評估的核心模型，以及一個擴展模型，增加了意圖、控制和可追溯性。這個模型被定位為一個最小的操作基線，並具有向更高保真度表示擴展的潛力。基於本文產出的實例展示了其適用性。
2604.25346.author: Geraldo Xexéo et.al.
